grant_title: The Urgent Call to Expand Telehealth in Rural America
eligible_applicant_type: community health centers in rural regions
geographic_restrictions: Rural areas in the United States
project_area: Expansion of telehealth infrastructure and services in rural communities
demographic_requirements: Focus on rural populations, particularly those with limited access to healthcare, including older adults and individuals with chronic conditions or mental health needs
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants include rural hospitals, clinics, and healthcare providers seeking to implement or expand telehealth programs. Priority may be given to organizations addressing infrastructure gaps, reimbursement challenges, or digital literacy barriers in rural communities.
